data.title: RED: Write failing test for Part B residual-state probe
data.description:
## Testing Mode
RED

## Description
Create tests/hooks/test-residual-state-probe.sh with a structural boundary test asserting epic-scrutiny-pipeline.md Part B contains a residual-state probe section.

Given/When/Then: Given epic-scrutiny-pipeline.md exists, When grepping Part B section for the canonical phrase "deprecate, relocate, or rename any file paths", Then the assertion matches.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] tests/hooks/test-residual-state-probe.sh exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x tests/hooks/test-residual-state-probe.sh
- [ ] Test asserts Part B contains residual-state probe with canonical phrase
  Verify: grep -q "deprecate.*relocate.*rename" tests/hooks/test-residual-state-probe.sh
- [ ] Test fails (RED) against unmodified epic-scrutiny-pipeline.md
  Verify: ! bash tests/hooks/test-residual-state-probe.sh 2>/dev/null
- [ ] .test-index updated with RED marker for epic-scrutiny-pipeline.md
  Verify: grep '\[test_' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index | grep -q 'epic-scrutiny-pipeline'
